productDisplayName: Spykar Men Grey Sporty Innerwear Vest
description: Composition Grey sleeveless vest made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, has a u-neckline, shoulder straps with blue ribbing around the armholes and neckline, racer back, printed labelling and brand tab towards the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not iron on print This vest from spykar is crafted using non-pilling cotton that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch with ease. Wear this under your shirt or team it with tracks when you're relaxing at home. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
